transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Are you attending the guest science lecture tonight?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Yes. I heard the speaker is an expert in climate research.

transcript.question_intro: Why is the man attending the lecture?

questions.prompt: Why is the man attending the lecture?

choices.text: He has to present a report.
He wants to hear an expert on climate research.
He is meeting a friend after class.

questions.explanation: The man says he heard the speaker is an expert in climate research.
questions.evidence: I heard the speaker is an expert in climate research.
